description_long: This is a Makita cordless electric drill, featuring a robust black and teal plastic body with ergonomic rubberized grip for comfortable handling. The drill has a prominent metallic chuck at the front for holding drill bits, and a white adjustable torque collar with visible numeric markings. The base houses a detachable 18V lithium-ion battery pack, which is black with white labeling and a metallic belt clip attached for portability. The side of the drill displays the Makita logo in white, and there are visible ventilation slots on the body for cooling. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban construction, repair, or DIY settings.
description: A Makita cordless electric drill with a teal and black body, ergonomic grip, metallic chuck, and detachable battery pack. Features include a visible brand logo, torque collar, and ventilation slots.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the Makita logo, metallic chuck, torque collar, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and belt clip.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the battery pack, side label, and ventilation slots.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the chuck opening, torque collar, and top of the handle.
